hero.subtitle: Scale your global support with ASAIR's highly customisable multi-tenant platform. Connect {whatsapp}, {telegram}, and {line} in minutes.

integrations.sectionLabel: Seamlessly integrates with your global channels

features.sectionSubtitle: ASAIR combines a powerful omnichannel platform with bespoke development and security services. Get everything your enterprise needs in one partner.

multitenant.title: Core Multi-tenant Platform
multitenant.description: Enterprise-grade omnichannel inbox with unified conversation management. Connect WhatsApp, Telegram, LINE, and custom channels in a single, powerful platform.

webDev.title: Bespoke Network App Development
webDev.description: Custom web and network application development tailored to your enterprise needs. Build scalable solutions that integrate seamlessly with your ASAIR platform.

security.title: Integrated Cyber Security Setup
security.description: Security-first enterprise infrastructure with comprehensive data protection, DDoS mitigation, and compliance standards built in from day one.

rd.title: Advanced Software R&D
rd.description: Complex backend development, experimental AI labs, and workflow automation. Access cutting-edge research capabilities including Dify-powered workflow orchestration.

globalReach.title: Global Reach
globalReach.description: Multi-region deployment with local compliance and data residency requirements.

enterpriseGrade.title: Enterprise Grade
enterpriseGrade.description: 99.99% uptime SLA, dedicated infrastructure, and premium support included.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered
aiPowered.description: Advanced AI workflows with custom LLM integration and experimental features.

journey.sectionSubtitle: From initial consultation to full deployment, we guide your organization through every step of the transformation.
journey.ctaTitle: Ready to Begin Your Enterprise Journey?
journey.ctaSubtitle: Let's discuss how ASAIR can transform your global customer support operations.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We work with your team to understand your specific business challenges, scale requirements, and technical constraints.

steps.title: Tailored Design
steps.description: Custom solutions designed specifically for your enterprise needs, combining platform capabilities with bespoke development services.

steps.title: Deployment & Support
steps.description: Seamless deployment with dedicated support teams ensuring smooth rollout, training, and ongoing optimization for your organization.

cta.title1: Ready to scale your enterprise support
cta.subtitle: Transform your global customer support operations with ASAIR's enterprise-grade omnichannel AI platform. From consultation to deployment, we're with you every step.
